title: Nuanced Opinions
description: Expressing complex opinions that acknowledge counterpoints: on balance, arguably, from a different angle.
summary_pt_br: Opiniões matizadas: on balance, arguably, from a different angle. Mostra que considerou alternativas.

scenes.subtitle_en: Expressing complex opinions that acknowledge counterpoints: on balance, arguably, from a different angle.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Opiniões matizadas: on balance, arguably, from a different angle. Mostra que considerou alternativas.

scenes.text_en: Expressing complex opinions that acknowledge counterpoints: on balance, arguably, from a different angle. Focus: nuanced opinions. On balance, I would favor the revised proposal.
scenes.text_pt: Opiniões matizadas: on balance, arguably, from a different angle. Mostra que considerou alternativas. Foco: nuanced opinions. No cômputo geral, eu prefiro a proposta revisada.

scenes.title: Nuanced Opinions
scenes.body_en: Structures: ON BALANCE / ARGUABLY / FROM A DIFFERENT ANGLE / THERE IS A CASE TO BE MADE FOR. Show you've considered alternatives before committing.
scenes.body_pt: Opiniões matizadas: on balance, arguably, from a different angle. Mostra que considerou alternativas.

examples.en: On balance, I would favor the revised proposal.
examples.pt: No cômputo geral, eu prefiro a proposta revisada.

examples.en: Arguably, social media has done more harm than good.
examples.pt: Pode-se argumentar que a rede social fez mais mal que bem.

examples.en: There is a case to be made for both approaches.
examples.pt: Há argumentos a favor das duas abordagens.

exercise.question: Complete: "On balance, I would favor the revised ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "On balance, I would favor the revised proposal."
exercise.hint_pt_br: No cômputo geral, eu prefiro a proposta revisada.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Arguably, social media has done more harm than good.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Arguably, social media has done more harm than good."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Pode-se argumentar que a rede social fez mais mal que bem.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Nuanced Opinions — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre nuanced opinions. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Give a nuanced opinion on remote work.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: On balance, I favor it but not universally.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Arguably, social media has done real damage.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Present two sides of AI regulation.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: There is a case for both caution and speed.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: From a different angle, schools work fine.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close with a qualified personal take.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My view, however tentative, is pro-reform.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nuance is the language of grown-up opinion.

scenes.title: The dinner debate
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the nuanced views exchanged. Use at least three opinion markers.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Over Sunday dinner, three generations debated whether technology had improved family life.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: On balance, I would say it has done more good than harm — but I acknowledge the costs clearly.

paragraphs.speaker: Uncle
paragraphs.en: Arguably, children spend less time present with adults than any previous generation in history.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: From a different angle, distant relatives stay close in ways we couldn't imagine twenty years ago.

paragraphs.speaker: Aunt
paragraphs.en: There is a case to be made for both continuity and disruption in how families use technology today.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Nuance, the family discovered across many Sundays, is what keeps disagreement from curdling into resentment.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Nuanced Opinions". Expressing complex opinions that acknowledge counterpoints: on balance, arguably, from a different angle. On balance, I would favor the revised proposal. Arguably, social media has done more harm than good. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Nuanced Opinions". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
